title: onosma arenaria subsp. fallax
intro: Onosma arenaria subsp. fallax, also known as the false glider's thumb or Onosma fallax, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onosma arenaria subsp. fallax include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit immunomodulatory and antitumor activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
